calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Manetas, for and with petitioner Robert H. Lee, Jr.

Mr. Manetas stated that although the house was transferred into the trust after the trust was established, there were no documents showing the existence of the Citibank accounts at the time the trust was created. He stated that there were no bank records available dating back to the date the trust was established. The petition is denied.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
